title: Smoky Sardinian Bread Panzanella
description: A smoky, gooey Sardinian bread salad that satisfies midnight cravings, featuring charred paleo bread, fresh vegetables, and aromatic herbs, all blended in a molcajete for a rustic finish.
instructions: Brush each slice of paleo bread with 1 tbsp of olive oil and place on a baking sheet.
Char the bread in the oven until dark and slightly crispy, about 10 minutes, then let cool and break into cubes.
Meanwhile, toss the diced tomatoes, sliced onion, diced zucchini, oregano, basil, cayenne, and a splash of olive oil in a bowl.
Transfer the vegetable mixture to a molcajete and crush lightly for 30 seconds to release flavors.
Add the cooled bread cubes to the molcajete and stir gently to coat with the herbaceous mixture.
Drizzle the balsamic vinegar over the salad, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
Toss in the chopped arugula and mix until just wilted, about 2 minutes.
Let the panzanella rest for 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the smoky Sardinian bread panzanella garnished with fresh parsley in a shallow bowl.
